title: SiTime Q2 2021 Earnings - Significant Margin Expansion and Record Growth
text: SiTime reported Q2 2021 earnings of $0.46 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.23 per share. Revenue for the quarter was $44.5 million, up 25% sequentially and up 107% year over year. Q2 was a very strong quarter on all metrics with exceptional revenue growth, significant gross margin expansion and strong year-over-year net income growth. SiTime had a significant step function increase in gross margins this quarter with non-GAAP gross margins at 61.3%, up more than seven points sequentially and up more than 14 points over Q2 of last year. Sales into the mobile IoT and consumer segment were $21.7 million or 49% of sales, down 3% sequentially but up 114% over the same quarter last year.
